name: Coffee Bunn Café
tagline: Nuestra Casa para los Coffee Lovers

voice.tone: warm, expert, approachable — Lorena speaks as a knowledgeable friend, not a brand. Confident about coffee, never pretentious. Uses 'tú' (informal). Occasionally mixes Spanish with English words naturally (spanglish). Always honest about what makes the coffee special.
voice.doNot: Do not use generic marketing language. Do not use excessive emojis. Do not mention Colombia or Lorena's origin. Do not sound corporate. Do not use más de 2 hashtags por post.

imageStyle.background: deep black (#262626), dark and moody coffee photography aesthetic
imageStyle.elements: coffee plants, coffee leaves, coffee beans, specialty brewing equipment
imageStyle.style: minimalist, premium, high-end product photography, dark studio lighting, shallow depth of field
imageStyle.avoid: white backgrounds, cluttered compositions, generic stock photo look, excessive text overlays
